title: Jasper Counts Happy Things
synopsis: Join Jasper as he counts from one to five while discovering things that make him feel happy, from one sunny day to five colorful balloons.

pages.text: Hi! I'm Jasper. I love counting happy things!

illustration.description: A cheerful boy named Jasper with wavy reddish-brown hair, fair freckled skin, green eyes, waving hello with a big smile, surrounded by colorful number shapes floating around him
illustration.alt: Jasper introducing himself with numbers around him

pages.text: ONE sunny day makes me happy!

illustration.description: Jasper with wavy reddish-brown hair, fair freckled skin, green eyes standing under one bright yellow sun, arms stretched wide with joy, the large number 1 prominently displayed

pages.text: TWO soft teddy bears make me happy!

illustration.description: Jasper with wavy reddish-brown hair, fair freckled skin, green eyes hugging two cute teddy bears, one brown and one cream colored, with the number 2 clearly visible

pages.text: THREE yummy cookies make me happy!

illustration.description: Jasper with wavy reddish-brown hair, fair freckled skin, green eyes sitting at a table with three chocolate chip cookies arranged in front of him, the number 3 prominently shown

pages.text: FOUR pretty flowers make me happy!

illustration.description: Jasper with wavy reddish-brown hair, fair freckled skin, green eyes in a garden holding four colorful flowers - red, yellow, pink, and purple, with the number 4 clearly displayed

pages.text: FIVE colorful balloons make me happy!

illustration.description: Jasper with wavy reddish-brown hair, fair freckled skin, green eyes holding five bright balloons in different colors - red, blue, green, yellow, and orange, with the number 5 prominently featured

pages.text: Counting happy things makes me feel good! What makes you happy?

illustration.description: Jasper with wavy reddish-brown hair, fair freckled skin, green eyes surrounded by all his happy things - the sun, teddy bears, cookies, flowers, and balloons, with numbers 1-5 arranged beautifully around the scene
illustration.alt: Jasper with all his happy things and numbers 1-5

metadata.illustrationStyle: clear countable objects, fun patterns, numbers prominent, visual counting, each number unique scene, engaging practice, organized arrangement, mathematical beauty

questions.question: How many teddy bears made Jasper happy?
questions.explanation: Jasper was happy with TWO soft teddy bears!

questions.question: What was there only ONE of?
questions.explanation: There was ONE sunny day that made Jasper happy!

questions.question: How many balloons did Jasper have?
